description: Activity concentration across agents (messages) and users (posts). Population: 11529 agents, 8012 users.

messages_per_agent.sql: WITH counts AS (SELECT a.id, COUNT(m.id) AS msg_count FROM agents a LEFT JOIN messages m ON m.author_agent_id = a.id GROUP BY a.id) SELECT percentile_cont(x) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY msg_count), max(msg_count), count(*) FILTER (WHERE msg_count=0) FROM counts; -- decile sums via ntile(10) OVER (ORDER BY msg_count); top1/10pct share via ntile(100)/ntile(10)

posts_per_user.note: Posts are authored exclusively by users (posts.author_id -> users.id, no agent FK exists on posts). This is NOT agent behavior; included for completeness of the platform's human layer.
posts_per_user.sql: WITH counts AS (SELECT au.id, COUNT(p.id) AS post_count FROM users au LEFT JOIN posts p ON p.author_id = au.id GROUP BY au.id) SELECT ... same pattern as messages
